title: Soulslike Deaths
description:
You can add extreme difficulty !
can you survive this !?
body:
# (ja) ソウルライクな死

プレイの難易度を上げる（死ぬ条件を追加）できるmodです。  
条件を設定してマイクラ力を上げよう！

## 設定可能な項目

- 水に触れたら死ぬ
- いかなるダメージでも死ぬ
- ヘッドショットで死ぬ
- 走ったら死ぬ

![設定画面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xzmADQbw/images/1dded1f5799a973755dcc8765b94b9de4e4e4568.png)

# (en) Soulslike Deaths

You can set additional rules of death  
You can play Extreme Minecraft !!

## available conditions

- death in water
- death from any damage.
- death by head shotted.
- death when running.

![death conditions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xzmADQbw/images/20ada70c2a20bf2d81613a04b600a0d2631f3f2e.png)

That Rules will upgrade in future version.
